description: Automate the header of the Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) document at /home/ga/Documents/SOP_805_Sterilization.odt to use dynamic metadata fields. Set the document Title to 'Steam Sterilization Protocol' and create custom text properties 'DocNumber' with the value 'SOP-805-V2' and 'Revision' with the value '2.0'. Update the document header to replace static text with these dynamic fields so the final header displays as: 'Title: Steam Sterilization Protocol | Doc #: SOP-805-V2 | Rev: 2.0'. Save the updated document to /home/ga/Documents/SOP_805_Automated.odt.
